name: the-advice-trap
description: Michael Bungay Stanier's The Advice Trap — tame your Advice Monster, stay curious longer, and lead through coaching questions instead of giving advice
useCase: Helps leaders, managers, and anyone who works with others shift from advice-giving to coaching — using the 7 coaching questions to build trust, develop capability, and foster psychological safety.
knownRisks: Coaching skills require practice — knowing the questions is not the same as using them
